exemptions.justification: Self-referential enforcement vocabulary: this literal is a member of DEFAULT_FORBIDDEN — the locked forbidden-term floor that THIS gate consumes at runtime to detect and reject the very term in scanned source. It is the gate scanning its own enforcement list, not a business-domain leak.
exemptions.whyUnavoidable: The term must appear verbatim for the gate to match real content carrying it; removing it disables enforcement of this term (behavior change). The central gate is authoritative enforcement; this default-floor literal is honestly exempted as scoped, reviewed, freshness-checked self-referential enforcement vocabulary (stale-detection emits a finding if the token ever moves/disappears).
